description: User scrolls through the task description on the Askable Sessions page, likely reading the instructions.
frame_description: The screen displays a task description for a user testing session on a dark background.

description: User continues scrolling to read the remainder of the task description.
frame_description: The user is reading the task instructions which involve booking a flight on the Flight Centre website.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button at the bottom of the task description to launch the test website.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and activates the 'Open' button located at the bottom center of the page.

description: A new browser tab opens, initially showing about:blank before redirecting to the Flight Centre website.
frame_description: A new browser tab is opened and is currently blank as it begins to load the target URL.

description: The Flight Centre homepage begins to load, showing the site header and skeleton loaders for the main content area.
page_title: Flight Centre Travel Deals - Book Flights, Hotels & Holidays
frame_description: The Flight Centre website header is visible, while the rest of the page content is represented by loading placeholders.

description: Significant horizontal movement detected as the page content renders and the layout settles.
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage content is populating, causing some layout shifts.

description: The 'Travel dates' calendar modal appears on the screen.
frame_description: A white modal with a calendar for February and March 2026 is displayed over the flight search form.

description: User clicks on the date selection field within the flight search widget to choose travel dates.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the date input field in the search widget on the homepage.

description: A promotional ad overlay for a loyalty program appears over the calendar modal.
frame_description: A red and white ad for 'World360' loyalty program covers the calendar content.

description: The date picker calendar opens, and a promotional popup for the loyalty program appears over the search widget.
frame_description: A calendar interface is visible for date selection, with a 'World360' promotional modal appearing on top of it.

description: The user clicks the close button (X) on the promotional ad overlay.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'X' in the top right corner of the ad overlay.

description: The promotional ad overlay disappears, revealing the calendar modal again.
frame_description: The ad is gone, and the February/March 2026 calendar is visible again.

description: The user clicks on the 'One way' tab within the travel dates modal.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the 'One way' button at the top of the modal.

description: The modal state changes to 'One way' selection mode.
frame_description: The 'One way' button is highlighted in blue.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 5th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor pauses briefly over the number 5 in the February calendar.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 18th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and pauses over the number 18.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 13th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 13.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 20th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 20.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 19th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 19.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 18th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the number 18.

description: The user selects February 18th as the departure date.
frame_description: The number 18 is highlighted in black to indicate selection.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 21st in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the number 21.

description: The user hovers the cursor over February 20th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 20.

description: The user selects February 21st as the return date.
frame_description: The number 21 is highlighted, and the range between 18 and 21 is shaded.

description: The modal state automatically changes back to 'Return' selection mode after picking a second date.
frame_description: The 'Return' button at the top of the modal is now highlighted in blue.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 10th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the March calendar and pauses over the number 10.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 19th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 19.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 26th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 26.

frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 27.

description: The user hovers the cursor over March 28th in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the number 28.

description: The user clicks the 'Done' button to confirm the selected dates.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Done' button in the bottom right of the modal.

description: The travel dates modal closes, returning the user to the main search form.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the main Flight Centre search page is visible with the selected dates populated.

description: The user hovers over the 'From' field which currently shows 'Sydney, Australia'.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the origin input field.

description: The user hovers over the 'Where to?' destination search field.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the destination input field.

description: The user clicks into the 'Where to?' field to search for a destination.
frame_description: The cursor clicks inside the 'Where to?' input box.

description: A dropdown menu with popular destination suggestions appears below the search field.
frame_description: A list of popular cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane appears below the input field.

description: The user hovers over 'Sydney, Australia' in the popular destinations list.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the first item in the dropdown list.

description: The user hovers over 'Melbourne, Australia' in the popular destinations list.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the second item in the dropdown list.

description: The user selects 'Melbourne, Australia' from the suggested destinations.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Melbourne entry in the dropdown.

description: The destination dropdown closes and the search field is updated with the selection.
frame_description: The dropdown disappears, and 'Melbourne, Australia' is now visible in the destination field.

description: The user clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the search.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the large blue 'Search flights' button.

description: The browser begins navigating to the flight search results page.
frame_description: The screen goes white as the new page starts to load.

description: A loading skeleton screen appears while the search results are being fetched.
frame_description: Grey placeholder boxes and a loading spinner are visible on the page.

description: The search results page begins loading, showing a red header and a white content area.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: Red header with Flight Centre logo and search parameters (MEL to SYD, 1 Adult, Economy) over a white background.

description: The page content shifts horizontally as the layout initializes.
frame_description: The white content area is visible below the red header.

description: The loading screen updates with a message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!'.
frame_description: The text 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' appears in the center of the screen.

description: A loading screen appears with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a cycling animation of airline logos.
frame_description: 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' text with airline logos cycling below (Air Canada, Air New Zealand, ANA, Etihad).

description: Airline logos and more loading indicators appear as results begin to populate.
frame_description: Logos for airlines like Air Canada and Qantas appear at the bottom of the loading area.

description: The flight search results for the departing leg (Sydney to Melbourne) are fully loaded and displayed.
frame_description: List of flights from SYD to MEL on Wednesday 18 Feb.

description: The user hovers the cursor over the price button for flight QF401.
frame_description: Cursor moves to the blue price button for the first flight result.

description: The user clicks on the price button for flight QF401 to view fare options.
frame_description: The button is clicked, initiating a UI expansion.

description: The 'Select Departing Fare Type' section expands below the selected flight, showing 'Red Edeal' and 'Economy Flex' options.
frame_description: Two fare cards appear below the Qantas flight details.

description: The user hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the 'Red Edeal' fare type.
frame_description: Cursor is positioned over the blue select button for the $307 fare.

description: The user selects the 'Red Edeal' fare for the departing flight.
frame_description: The select button is clicked.

description: The 'SELECT' button updates to a green checkmark, indicating the fare has been chosen.
frame_description: The blue button turns green with a white checkmark.

description: A 'Good choice!' overlay appears, informing the user it is time to choose the return journey.
frame_description: A white overlay with 'Good choice!' and 'It's time to choose your flight for your return journey...' text.

description: A loading spinner appears as the system fetches return flight results.
frame_description: A blue circular loading spinner is visible in the center of the screen.

description: The return flight search results (Melbourne to Sydney) are displayed.
frame_description: 'Select Return Flight' header with flights from MEL to SYD on Saturday 21 Feb.

description: The user scrolls down through the list of return flight options.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the first few return flight results.

description: User scrolls down the search results page to view more flight options.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: Search results page showing multiple flight options for Melbourne to Sydney.

page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises
frame_description: The user selects a specific Virgin Australia flight from the list.

description: The 'Select Returning Fare Type' options expand below the selected flight.

description: User clicks the SELECT button for the $157 Lite fare.
page_title: Flight Centre Australia | Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises

description: A loading overlay appears with the text 'All Set! Now let's review your flight selections...' and a spinner.
